entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The legume crop used for the identification and validation of InDel markers.

entities.name: INDEL MARKERS
entities.description: Insertion-deletion polymorphisms used for genetic analysis and crop breeding.

entities.name: CROP BREEDING
entities.description: The practice of improving crop plants through selective breeding.

entities.name: GENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the genetic makeup of an organism.

entities.name: RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of sequencing the genome of specific lines to identify variations.

entities.name: MAGIC PARENTAL LINES
entities.description: Multi-parent Advanced Generation Inter-Cross parental lines used as the source for marker identification.

entities.name: DINDEL SOFTWARE
entities.description: Software used to identify insertion-deletion polymorphisms from sequencing data.

entities.name: INTERGENIC REGIONS
entities.description: Non-coding DNA sequences located between genes.

entities.name: UPSTREAM REGIONS
entities.description: DNA sequences located before the start of a gene.

entities.name: DOWNSTREAM REGIONS
entities.description: DNA sequences located after the end of a gene.

entities.name: GENIC REGION
entities.description: DNA sequences that are part of a gene.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species.

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC RELATIONSHIPS
entities.description: The evolutionary history and relationships among individuals or species.

entities.name: MAPPING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Groups of individuals used to link genetic markers to specific traits or locations on a chromosome.

entities.name: AGAROSE GEL
entities.description: A technique used to separate DNA fragments by size to validate polymorphism.

entities.name: FUNNEL CROSSING SCHEME
entities.description: A specific breeding strategy used to develop the MAGIC population.

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used as a comparative baseline for InDel markers.
